'''Ession''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]], located at the nexus of the [[Shaltin Tunnels/Legends|Shaltin Tunnels]] and [[Lucaya Cross]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlanes]].<ref name="TEA" /> It has been settled since before [[6000 BBY]]<ref name="TEA" />, establishing itself as a thriving manufacturing and trading center of the Corporate Sector.<ref name="TEA" /> An industrial manufacturing center, it was the headquarters of [[Pakkerd Light Transport]], formerly a division of [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]].

After the death of the [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] and Sienar's loss of Pakkerd<ref name="TEA" />, the [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Zsinj]] seized Pakkerd Light Transport, building [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]] for use in his war machine, and sent the [[Ession Strike|''Night Caller'']]—under the control of [[Wraith Squadron]]—to protect the [[Implacable (Star Destroyer)/Legends|''Implacable'']] while it received the first shipment of new starfighters. However, the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] managed to get three squadrons of [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] to the planet aboard the [[Red Feathers|''Blood Nest'']], and was able to knock out the Pakkerd plant before the TIEs could launch. The Republic also managed to take out the ''Implacable''.

Ession was one of a number of planets where [[Roa]] encountered the [[Ryn/Legends|Ryn]]. It was also home to the [[Ession Freedom Front]], a violent revolutionary party.

{{Planet-stub}}
